target.title: fix(docs): reorder AGENTS.md template to protect critical rules from truncation
target.body:
fix(docs): reorder AGENTS.md template to protect critical rules from truncation

## Summary
**Problem:** The auto-generated `AGENTS.md` template puts personality/onboarding guidance (First Run, Session Startup, Memory) at the top and safety-critical rules (Red Lines, External vs Internal) at the bottom. When `bootstrapMaxChars` truncates from the head, the safety rules are stripped while less-critical content is preserved.

**Fix:** Reorder the template so Red Lines and External vs Internal appear immediately after the title, before First Run/Session Startup/Memory. Head-truncation now preserves the most operationally-critical guidance.

**Out of scope:** No changes to truncation logic, bootstrapMaxChars behavior, or content-aware truncation. Only reorders the template.

## Linked context
Closes #75187

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: AGENTS.md template orders safety rules after personality content, so head-truncation by bootstrapMaxChars strips the rules
- Real environment tested: Windows 10, Node.js v22.11.0, OpenClaw latest main (commit 3a64302, 2026-06-03)
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: Read the reordered template and verified Red Lines section appears at line 12 (before Memory at line 44)
- Evidence after fix: Terminal output showing the reordered template structure:
```
$ head -20 docs/reference/templates/AGENTS.md
---
summary: "Workspace template for AGENTS.md"
title: "AGENTS.md template"
read_when:
  - Bootstrapping a workspace manually
---

# AGENTS.md - Your Workspace

This folder is home. Treat it that way.

## Red Lines

- Don't exfiltrate private data. Ever.
- Don't run destructive commands without asking.
- Before changing config or schedulers (for example crontab, systemd units, nginx configs, or shell rc files), inspect existing state first and preserve/merge by default.
- `trash` > `rm` (recoverable beats gone forever)
- When in doubt, ask.

## External vs Internal
```
- Observed result after fix: Red Lines is now at line 12 (was at line 61). External vs Internal is at line 20 (was at line 69). With `bootstrapMaxChars: 1500`, the first ~1500 chars now include both safety sections.
- What was not tested: Live gateway bootstrap with small model (requires full OpenClaw setup)

## Tests and validation
- No code changes, only template reordering
- No CHANGELOG.md edits

## Risk checklist
- userVisible: Yes (AGENTS.md template order changes for new workspaces)
- configEnvMigration: No
- securityAuthNetwork: No
- Mitigation: Only reorders existing content, no content removed or added

## Current review state
- [x] AI-assisted (built with Claude Code)
